'''rajodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:khayal|khayal]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-j-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:khayal|khayal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| rajodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræjedeth|ræjedeth]] || [[word:ræjedej|ræjedej]] || [[word:ræjedesh|ræjedesh]] || [[word:ræjede|ræjede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rajojodoth|rajojodoth]] || [[word:rajojodoj|rajojodoj]] || [[word:rajojodosh|rajojodosh]] || [[word:rajojodo|rajojodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rajodoth|rajodoth]] || [[word:rajodoj|rajodoj]] || [[word:rajodosh|rajodosh]] || [[word:rajodo|rajodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rajofdoth|rajofdoth]] || [[word:rajofdoj|rajofdoj]] || [[word:rajofdosh|rajofdosh]] || [[word:rajofdof|rajofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rajodotho|rajodotho]] || [[word:rajodojo|rajodojo]] || [[word:rajodosho|rajodosho]] || [[word:rajodoko|rajodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rajodoth|rajodoth]] || [[word:rajodoj|rajodoj]] || [[word:rajodosh|rajodosh]] || [[word:rajodo|rajodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rajodothol|rajodothol]] || [[word:rajodojol|rajodojol]] || [[word:rajodoshol|rajodoshol]] || [[word:rajodokol|rajodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rajodothotho|rajodothotho]] || [[word:rajodojojo|rajodojojo]] || [[word:rajodoshosho|rajodoshosho]] || [[word:rajodoko|rajodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rajodothon|rajodothon]] || [[word:rajodojon|rajodojon]] || [[word:rajodoshon|rajodoshon]] || [[word:rajodokon|rajodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rajodothoro|rajodothoro]] || [[word:rajodojoro|rajodojoro]] || [[word:rajodoshoro|rajodoshoro]] || [[word:rajodokoro|rajodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
